name: clisponsor
description: CLIsponsor installer for Codex, Claude Code, and Gemini sponsored CLI placements.

scripts.check: node --check bin/agent-ads.mjs && node --check templates/codex-plugin/scripts/cliads_codex_hook.mjs && node --check templates/claude/cliads_claude_hook.mjs && node --check templates/claude/cliads_statusline.mjs && npm run test
